name: all-bookings-and-payments
description: Full bookings list for one account — status tabs, month filter, searchable history.
notes: Figma `Size=Mobile, Type=Sticky TopBar` → variants/mobile-content-indication/ (title + month in one sticky card + scroll shadow).
Figma `Size=Desktop, Type=Sticky NavBar` → variants/desktop-sticky-nav-bar/ (account summary + month in one sticky card after title scrolls off).
Sticky UI rule: one container per phase — do not split title and month into separate sticky elements.
Entry: account-details bookings card or More functions → Show all bookings (see flow PNG).
